changes.title: New Features
changes.text:
Post Processing Effects - Screen Space Ambient Occlusion support
URP Render Objects support
Support for Mixed Lighting with Realtime Shadows
Optimize Unity 6 build export time
[Applovin] New analytics integration
Implement AppLovin custom events
Snapchat platform new requirements update
Add BlendShapes support to Mesh Simplification Tool
Add warning for URP SSAO usage

changes.title: Fixes and Improvements
changes.text:
Unity 6 URP shadows fix - distant objects do not cast shadows (DepthClamp)
Fix shaders being missed on Android devices
Fix Moloco upload failures
[BIRP] Fix - GrabPass functionality is not working, when linear color space is active
Remove invalid shaders from LunaSVC before Plugin window initialization
Change material not found error logging to warning
Fix incorrect lights behavior in playable
Fix - position of Canvas AABB is not updating when changing position
Fix - Particle System is not working on instantiated prefab
